zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Hawise Botterell於大約1215年出生在英國武斯特斯爾騰波瑞 威爾斯時，她的父親John de Botreaux31歲，母親Hawise de Newmarch6歲。她於1234年之後與Hugh de Gournay在英國奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1291年在英國波藍德享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭恩布利亞沙普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess Hawise Botterell于大约1215年出生在英国武斯特斯爾騰波瑞 威爾斯时，她的父亲John de Botreaux31岁，母亲Hawise de Newmarch6岁。她于1234年之后与Hugh de Gournay在英国奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1291年在英国波藍德享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰恩布利亞沙普。

nameMeanings.name: Botterell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Buttery
meanings: from Anglo-Norman French boterie ‘buttery’ (from Late Latin botaria, a derivative of bota ‘cask’), hence a metonymic occupational name for the keeper of a buttery. The term originally denoted a store for liquor but soon came to mean a store for provisions in general.

variants.name: Butter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Arno, Gerhard, Mathias, Reinhart.
Dutch and German: occupational name for a dairyman or seller of butter, from Middle Dutch butter and Middle High German buter.
English: occupational name for a dairyman, a shortened form of Middle English buterer ‘maker or seller of butter’. Alternatively, it may be a nickname from Middle English buter(e) ‘butter’.

variants.name: Botterill
meanings: 1 Norman, English: locative name from Les Bottereaux (Eure, Normandy), a place-name which apparently meant ‘the toads’. The surname is found in both a singular form Boterel and a plural form Boterels, Botereaus, which has developed to Buttress. Some of the post-medieval bearers may belong under (2).

2 Norman, English: occupational name from Anglo-Norman French * boterel, a diminutive form of Old French * boter ‘an officer who looks after the (wine) butts’. Both terms are derivatives of Old French butte, bote ‘wine-butt, cask’.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Hawise Botterell was born about 1215, in Tenbury Wells, Worcestershire, England, her father, John de Botreaux, was 31 and her mother, Hawise de Newmarch, was 6. She married Hugh de Gournay after 1234, in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1291, in Cumberland, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Shap, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Hawise Botterell est née environ 1215, à Tenbury Wells, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John de Botreaux, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Newmarch, avait 6 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Gournay après 1234, à Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1291, à Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Shap, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Hawise Botterell um 1215 in Tenbury Wells, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Botreaux 31 und ihre Mutter Hawise de Newmarch 6. Sie hat nach 1234 in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England Hugh de Gournay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1291 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Cumberland, England und wurde in Shap, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Hawise Botterell è nata il circa 1215 nel Tenbury Wells, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, John de Botreaux, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Hawise de Newmarch, aveva 6 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Gournay dopo il 1234, nel Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1291, nel Cumberland, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Shap, Cumbria, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Hawise Botterellが約1215年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアテンブリー ウエルズで生まれた時，父John de Botreauxは31歳，母Hawise de Newmarchは6歳であった。1234年以後にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアマプレドウルハムでHugh de Gournayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1291年にイギリスクウンバーランドで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンブリアシャップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Hawise Botterell(이)가 대략 1215년 영국 워스스터실르 텐버이 웰스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Botreaux(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de Newmarch(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 1234년 이후 영국 스퍼드실르 마플레더람에서 Hugh de Gournay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1291년 영국 쿠벌랜드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 쿠브리아 샤프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Hawise Botterell nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Tenbury Wells, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Botreaux, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Newmarch, tinha 6 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Gournay após 1234, em Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1291, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Shap, Cumbria, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Hawise Botterell родилась около 1215 г. в местности тенбури веллс, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Botreaux было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Newmarch, 6. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Gournay после 1234 г. в местности мапледурам, оксфордшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1291 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности шап, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1215–about 1291: e tusa o le 1215–e tusa o le 1291

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Hawise Botterell nació aproximadamente 1215, en Tenbury Wells, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Botreaux, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Hawise de Newmarch, tenía 6 años. Se casó con Hugh de Gournay después de 1234, en Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1291, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Shap, Cumbria, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
